creator: fsbruva@yahoo.com
text:
Created attachment 242202
Failed libcaca poudriere build log.

(In reply to Thomas Zander from comment #1)
I don't know what to say. What's in your make.conf? What other libcaca options do you have set/unset? 

I see that when building most of the rest of the directories (such as src), the -DLIBCACA=1 -DX_DISPLAY_MISSING=1  flags are passed. 

However, when it comes time to building the examples directory, libtool is not used, and those flags are not set.
